hero.title: Clear packages. Fixed prices. No surprises.
hero.description: Pick the package that fits — cancel monthly. For anything bigger, we tailor an individual offer.

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.description: The easy start — an AI assistant that answers questions and books appointments.

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.description: Everything included — your digital employees for phone, chat, social media and sales.

tiers.name: Individual
tiers.description: Entirely your way — services, scope and billing (monthly or yearly) fully flexible.

items.a: Yes. Standard and Premium can be cancelled monthly — no long commitment.

items.q: What's included in the Premium package?
items.a: Everything: voice, chat and social media agent, the sales agent and the automation of your workflows — plus everything in Standard.

items.q: Can I start small and expand later?
items.a: Of course. Many start with Standard and later move to Premium or an individual solution.

items.q: What if I need something special?
items.a: Then Individual is right: we put together services, scope and billing exactly to your wishes.
No. The monthly price is clear. Any one-time setup or special requests are agreed transparently upfront.
